hooks.command: if command -v datafog-hook >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec datafog-hook; elif command -v uvx >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uvx --from 'datafog>=4.6.0' datafog-hook; else echo 'datafog plugin: engine not installed — run: pip install datafog' >&2; exit 1; fi
if command -v datafog-hook >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec datafog-hook; elif command -v uvx >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uvx --from 'datafog>=4.6.0' datafog-hook; else exit 0; fi
if command -v datafog-hook >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec datafog-hook; elif command -v uvx >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uvx --from 'datafog>=4.6.0' datafog-hook; else exit 0; fi
